programme.title: Tuhog
programme.desc: A bus accident along a major road pierces together the bodies of three random people. As the doctors try to save their lives, the three victims get acquainted with each other.

programme.title: Kahit Isang Saglit
programme.desc: Young architects face many personal, professional and romantic challenges.

programme.title: Bata Batuta
programme.desc: Dolphy's youngest son, Vandolph, joins showbiz, gains star status.

programme.title: Notoryus
programme.desc: Toryo cannot seem to avoid trouble and has been in and out of prison more times than he can remember.

programme.title: Nakalimutan Ko Nang Kalimutan Ka
programme.desc: When her boyfriend suddenly disappears, a heartbroken Jaz turns to a doctor for an unconventional cure. Meanwhile, her best friend decides to take her on a trip in a bid to help her move on.

programme.title: Singsing Ni Lola
programme.desc: Doomed with a curse that kills all women in her bloodline when they turn eighteen, Esper narrowly avoids her death after she receives a ring from her grandmother. However, the ring is lost, and she must find it before her own daughter turns 18.

programme.title: Magic to Love
programme.desc: Xerox, an alien who is in love with RTW, a mannequin, lands on Earth to find his lover. In his search mission, he is helped by Twinkle and Boots.

programme.title: Maria, Leonora, Teresa
programme.desc: Faith, Julio, and Stella are given life-sized dolls to cope with a tragedy, but the toys are controlled by a sinister master.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When a man falls deeply in love, he's ready to do whatever it takes to win her heart and her father's approval. There's a catch, however. To earn her hand in marriage, he must live under her father's roof for three intense months of training. What begins as a simple sacrifice for love soon turns into a game of endurance, secrets and unexpected lessons.

programme.title: Suddenly It's Magic
programme.desc: Marcus, a superstar actor from Thailand, travels to the Philippines to escape the limelight. He soon meets and falls in love with Joey, a baker, despite their differing backgrounds.

programme.title: Sin Island
programme.desc: After his wife seems to lose interest in him, a photographer travels to an exotic island where he begins a dangerous affair with a recently separated woman.

programme.title: Maria, Leonora, Teresa
programme.desc: Faith, Julio, and Stella are given life-sized dolls to cope with a tragedy, but the toys are controlled by a sinister master.

programme.title: I Think I'm in Love
programme.desc: Jonas, a womanizer, has a string of affairs with different young women. Tired of his lifestyle, his brother challenges him to be with a woman for three months without having any sexual contact.

programme.title: Kasunduan
programme.desc: August, an orphan, sheds off his compassionate and idealistic self once he enters the world of organized crime and becomes a criminal.

programme.title: #WalangForever
programme.desc: Mia, a celebrated scriptwriter, reaches a point in life where she does not believe in lasting love. However, her life turns upside down after her ex-boyfriend comes back to her.

programme.title: Mano Po 5: Gua Ai Di
programme.desc: A freewheeling veterinarian (Richard Gutierrez) tries to follow Chinese customs while wooing a tradition-minded Chinese woman (Angel Locsin).

programme.title: Sugatang Puso
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are forced to take in his difficult son from his previous marriage. When the son and the wife's son get involved in a car accident, life drastically changes.

programme.title: Pido Dida: Sabay Tayo
programme.desc: Pido and Dida grow up together in an orphanage and share a great bond with each other. Things change when their parents find them and they get separated.

programme.title: Can't Help Falling in Love
programme.desc: Two strangers accidentally get married.

programme.title: Rematado
programme.desc: A disgraced cop tries to make amends with his angry wife by getting her pawned wedding ring back, but after robbers steal the ring from the pawn shop, he is forced to track them down to save his marriage.

programme.title: Guwapings Dos
programme.desc: Three friends embark on an adventure together to try to overcome their personal demons in order to survive.

programme.title: Tar-San
programme.desc: Tar and San are formally declared as future chiefs of the Agatao tribe. However, they find an enemy in Sabukot, who has his eyes on the throne himself.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: When Daniel and Ruby move to the orchard home inherited from Daniel’s eccentric uncle, it seems inhospitable - until Ruby discovers a magic well.

programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe valiantly sets free Brian the Bard, he discovers he is now stuck with him... until such time that Brian saves Prince Ivandoe's life in return.

programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the turnip thief... the very worst type of thief!

programme.desc: June has been doing her Te Xuan Ze thing (acting as the Protector) for just over a month, and it's become a real hassle.

programme.desc: When June's school chorus goes to a nursing home to perform, Roger finds half of a cursed Viking medallion.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.desc: This documentary offers an intimate and comprehensive journey through the extraordinary career of Lionel Messi — from his humble beginnings in Rosario, Argentina, to becoming a global football icon.

programme.desc: From a small-town prodigy to World No. 1, Andy Murray: Game Set Match chronicles his relentless pursuit of greatness, his battles with injury, and his enduring legacy as one of tennis's most inspiring figures.

programme.title: Keanu Reeves: The One And Only
programme.desc: The journey of Keanu Reeves, travel through his youth, his versatile filmography and his many emotinal peaks and troughs to uncover what makes this fantastic icon so celebrated.

programme.title: Whitney: Behind The Voice
programme.desc: A powerful journey into the meteoric rise of Whitney Houston — from her gospel roots to global superstardom — unraveling the tangled relationships, haunting battles with addiction, and the heartbreaking fall of a once-unshakable voice, before her untimely end.

programme.title: Celine Dion: The Heart Goes On
programme.desc: Celine Dion is a household name, synonymous with musical brilliance. Yet, her life has not been untouched by hardship. Join us as we uncover the story behind the legend, her meteoric rise to fame, and the personal trials that shaped her remarkable career.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Discover how and why the fighter-bomber Panavia Tornado has been so useful in so many roles for so many years.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born To Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One And Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Kylian Mbappé: Rising Star
programme.desc: There are few players who capture the imagination of fans worldwide quite like Kylian Mbappé. In just over a decade, he went from absolute obscurity to becoming one of the most famous players in the world.

programme.title: Messi: The Chosen One
programme.desc: This documentary offers an intimate and comprehensive journey through the extraordinary career of Lionel Messi — from his humble beginnings in Rosario, Argentina, to becoming a global football icon.

programme.title: Andy Murray: Game, Set, Match
programme.desc: From a small-town prodigy to World No. 1, Andy Murray: Game Set Match chronicles his relentless pursuit of greatness, his battles with injury, and his enduring legacy as one of tennis's most inspiring figures.

programme.title: Kylian Mbappé: Rising Star
programme.desc: There are few players who capture the imagination of fans worldwide quite like Kylian Mbappé. In just over a decade, he went from absolute obscurity to becoming one of the most famous players in the world.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Volunteers explore the community’s role in conservation, with thrilling honey harvesting, a new addition to the team, and a dream come true as one feeds a black rhino.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: The instinct to secure a mate is one of the most powerful that there is. From the beautiful to the bizarre, this episode explores the most amazing mating rituals from right across the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: As the AFL pushes for growth, we uncover new evidence of brain disease in younger players. Families of players diagnosed with CTE speak about the risks of repeated head trauma. Has the AFL been transparent about the risks?

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Karl Stefanovic loses his job after embracing a controversial anti-Islam activist. ABC rejects an opinion piece by business woman Sall Grover. CCP propaganda finds its way into regional newspapers, in a branded opinion piece.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work
programme.desc: In this peep behind Bega's factory doors, Dr Karl learns how cheese is made... and it would appear that he knows more about String Theory, than he does string cheese. (Final)

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Husband and wife architects Gaurav and Vish design a multigenerational home for their aging parents and young children, entirely clad in over 9000 terracotta tiles.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country
programme.desc: On SA's Limestone Coast, Craig heads to a non-conformist winery, Kristy meets a couple who traded in a life of luxury yachts to hang out with camels and Halina explores a clever approach to tackling plastic waste.

programme.title: Magic and the Brain: The Science of Illusion - A Catalyst Special
programme.desc: Lily Serna explores the strange world of sensory perception, using magic and illusions to reveal the difference between how we perceive the world - and reality.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: You're invited to the final night of Refugee Week celebrations, as Adam, advocate Abang Anade Othow and cooking instructor Nige Sithirasegaram have friends for dinner.

programme.desc: Migrant families and athletes of multicultural heritage are changing Australia's sporting culture. From social sport to elite athletes, Paul Kennedy examines how sport helps build community, identity and opportunity.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Sam Wykes and Tinirau Arona chat with rising Wests Tigers star Dawn Tui and NRLW player Kiana Takairangi. Plus Tiana interviews veteran weightlifter Jenly Wini, and Vanuatu Rugby League returns to the international stage.
